title: velvety syrian uni tagine
description: a citrusy, velvety, festive syrian dish featuring uni, yuzu-cure, and a low-carb-friendly twist.
instructions: heat 2 tbsp of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
add the minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for another minute.
add the cumin, paprika, and a pinch of salt, stirring to combine.
add the yuzu juice and lemon juice, stirring to deglaze the pan.
add the uni, chicken broth, and heavy cream, stirring to combine.
bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 8-10 minutes, or until the uni is cooked through.
season with salt and pepper to taste.
serve hot, garnished with yuzu zest and additional yuzu juice if desired.
serve immediately, as the uni will continue to cook and break down in the sauce.
